vision: A mobile application that helps individuals manage daily tasks efficiently through a simple, distraction-free interface for creating, tracking, and completing personal to-do items.

epics.name: Task Creation
epics.description: Enable users to capture and add new tasks to their personal to-do list with essential details

stories.title: Create task with title
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to create a new task with a title, so that I can capture my responsibilities quickly
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the task list screen When I tap the add task button and enter a title Then a new task is created and appears in my list
Given I am creating a new task When I submit without entering a title Then the task is not created and I see a validation message
stories.notes: Walking skeleton - core task creation functionality

stories.title: Add due date to task
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to set a due date when creating a task, so that I can track when tasks need to be completed
acceptance_criteria: Given I am creating a new task When I tap the due date field Then I can select a date from a date picker
Given I am creating a task When I set a due date and save Then the task displays the due date in the list
stories.notes: Due date is optional based on document context

epics.name: Task Completion
epics.description: Allow users to mark tasks as complete to track their progress and accomplishments

stories.title: Mark task as complete
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to mark a task as complete, so that I can track my progress and see what I have accomplished
acceptance_criteria: Given I have an incomplete task in my list When I tap the completion checkbox Then the task is marked as complete with visual feedback
Given I have a completed task When I view it in the list Then it displays a completed state distinct from incomplete tasks

stories.title: Unmark task as incomplete
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to unmark a completed task, so that I can correct mistakes or reactivate tasks I need to redo
acceptance_criteria: Given I have a completed task When I tap the completion checkbox again Then the task is marked as incomplete
Given I unmark a task as incomplete When I view the task list Then it appears as an active incomplete task

epics.name: Task Deletion
epics.description: Enable users to remove tasks from their list to keep their task list clean and relevant

stories.title: Delete task from list
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to delete a task from my list, so that I can remove items that are no longer relevant
acceptance_criteria: Given I have a task in my list When I perform the delete action on it Then the task is removed from my list
Given I delete a task When I view my task list Then the deleted task no longer appears

stories.title: Confirm before deleting task
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to confirm before a task is deleted, so that I do not accidentally remove important tasks
acceptance_criteria: Given I initiate a delete action on a task When the confirmation prompt appears and I confirm Then the task is deleted
Given I initiate a delete action on a task When the confirmation prompt appears and I cancel Then the task remains in my list

epics.name: Task List Viewing
epics.description: Provide users with a clear view of all their tasks in an organised list format

stories.title: View all tasks in list
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to view all my tasks in a list format, so that I can see everything I need to do at a glance
acceptance_criteria: Given I have tasks saved When I open the app Then I see all my tasks displayed in a list
Given I have no tasks When I view the task list Then I see an empty state message

stories.title: Display task details in list
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to see task title, due date, and completion status in the list, so that I can quickly assess my tasks
acceptance_criteria: Given I have tasks with due dates When I view the task list Then each task shows its title, due date, and completion status
Given a task has no due date When I view it in the list Then it displays without a due date field

epics.name: Task Filtering
epics.description: Allow users to filter their task list to focus on specific subsets of tasks

stories.title: Filter tasks by incomplete status
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to filter to see only incomplete tasks, so that I can focus on what still needs to be done
acceptance_criteria: Given I have both complete and incomplete tasks When I select the incomplete filter Then only incomplete tasks are displayed
Given I am viewing filtered incomplete tasks When I mark a task complete Then it is removed from the current filtered view

stories.title: Filter tasks by complete status
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to filter to see only completed tasks, so that I can review what I have accomplished
acceptance_criteria: Given I have both complete and incomplete tasks When I select the complete filter Then only completed tasks are displayed
Given I am viewing filtered complete tasks When I unmark a task as incomplete Then it is removed from the current filtered view

stories.title: Clear filter to view all tasks
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want to clear filters and see all tasks, so that I can return to the full task list view
acceptance_criteria: Given I have an active filter applied When I clear the filter Then all tasks are displayed regardless of completion status
Given I clear the filter When I view the task list Then the filter control shows no active filter

epics.name: Data Persistence
epics.description: Ensure user tasks are saved and available across app sessions

stories.title: Persist tasks between sessions
stories.user_story: As an Individual User, I want my tasks to be saved when I close the app, so that I do not lose my task list
acceptance_criteria: Given I have created tasks When I close and reopen the app Then all my tasks are still present
Given I mark a task complete and close the app When I reopen the app Then the task remains marked as complete
stories.notes: Walking skeleton - essential for usable app
